name: visual-regression-baseline
description: Capture visual baseline screenshots for all routes × viewports, then verify a UI change doesn't break layout via visual-diff.
prompt: Use browser_agent.py to: (1) serve the app, (2) capture baseline screenshots at /home and /about for mobile (375x812) and desktop (1280x720), (3) apply the proposed CSS change (button color), (4) re-capture, (5) run visual-diff. If diff < 0.1%, mark as PASS. If diff > 0.1% and only the button color changed, mark as acceptable visual change.
